chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-1699 of 2012 _______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For direction. 14.09.2021 Mr. Kazim Hassan advocate for the petitioner. M/s Ali Asadullah Bullo and Manzoor Hameed Arain advocates for EOBI. ------------------------- At the outset, learned counsel for the petitioner in C.P No.1699/2012 seeks disposal of this petition in terms within the guideline provided by Apex Court in PLD 2017 SC 28, which pertains to the vires only. According to him this petition was allowed. Accordingly this petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E S.Soomro/P.A
